case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. WALTON MARTIN CENAC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,407.80 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CENAC, WALTON MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-05-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CENAC, WALTON MARTIN
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 MAILED TO WALTON CENAC ON AUGUST 5, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT.
